channel.title: GitHub 热门日报
channel.description: 每天一份 GitHub Trending 中文精选

item.title: SmartlyDressedGames/U3-SDK
item.description: 待翻译：Source code for Unturned, a free open-world zombie survival sandbox game.

item.title: addyosmani/agent-skills
item.description: 待翻译：Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
item.category: 开发框架, AI代理, skills

item.title: VoltAgent/awesome-design-md
item.description: 待翻译：A collection of DESIGN.md files analysis by popular brand design systems. Drop one into your project and let coding agents generate a matching UI.

item.title: iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
item.description: 待翻译：OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

item.title: wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP
item.description: 待翻译：This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities

item.title: anthropics/claude-cookbooks
item.description: 待翻译：A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

item.title: vxcontrol/pentagi
item.description: 待翻译：Fully autonomous AI Agents system capable of performing complex penetration testing tasks

item.title: unclecode/crawl4ai
item.description: 待翻译：🚀🤖 Crawl4AI: Open-source LLM Friendly Web Crawler & Scraper. Don't be shy, join here: https://discord.gg/jP8KfhDhyN

item.title: imthenachoman/How-To-Secure-A-Linux-Server
item.description: 待翻译：An evolving how-to guide for securing a Linux server.

item.title: huxingyi/autoremesher
item.description: 待翻译：Automatic quad remeshing tool

item.title: bradautomates/claude-video
item.description: 待翻译：Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.

item.title: prisma/prisma
item.description: 待翻译：Next-generation ORM for Node.js & TypeScript | PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, SQLite, MongoDB and CockroachDB

item.title: kyutai-labs/pocket-tts
item.description: 待翻译：A TTS that fits in your CPU (and pocket)

item.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
item.description: 待翻译：Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
